voteDescription: **The Honorable {initiator}** has filed a motion to silence **{target}**. The jury will now deliberate.
votePassedDescription: The defendant **{target}** has been found GUILTY by a jury of their peers and sentenced to **{duration} minutes** of silence.
voteExpiredDescription: The case against **{target}** has been dismissed due to insufficient jury votes. {votes}/{needed} jurors showed up. Pathetic.
userMutedDescription: The defendant **{target}** has been escorted to the shadow realm for **{duration} minutes**. Order in the court.
dmDescription: The court of **{server}** has sentenced you to **{duration} minutes** of silence. Your crimes against the chat have not gone unnoticed.
dmTip: Appeals can be filed by boosting the server. The court accepts bribes in the form of Nitro boosts (1 hour immunity).
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: **{executor}** has been held in contempt for attempting to pardon **{target}** without judicial authority.
selfMuteReactions: The defendant has... pleaded guilty? Your Honor, this is unprecedented.
Let the record show that the defendant has voted for their own conviction. The court is baffled.
OBJECTION! The defendant can't— actually, you know what, we'll allow it.
The defendant has exercised their right to self-incrimination. Bold strategy.
Your Honor, the defendant appears to be their own hostile witness.
footerText: Click below to cast your verdict
